question: According to Meta's data center sustainability metrics, what were the Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE) values from 2017 to 2022, and what percentage of data centers and offices were covered by green building standards in 2022?
answers: Meta's PUE improved from 1.10 in 2017 to 1.08 in 2022, with values of 1.11 in 2018-2019, 1.10 in 2020, and 1.09 in 2021. By 2022, 99% of total square footage was covered by green building standards and/or Energy Management Systems (EnMS), up from 98% in 2021. Data centers are required to achieve LEED Gold or higher certification.
PUE values: 2017-1.10, 2018-1.11, 2019-1.11, 2020-1.10, 2021-1.09, 2022-1.08. Green building coverage: 99% in 2022 (vs 98% in 2021). Data centers require LEED Gold or higher.
